name: Get-ADUser User Discovery and Export
notes:
This rule triggers when usage of the Get-ADUser cmdlet to collect user information and output it to a file.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: User Discovery And Export Via Get-ADUser Cmdlet - PowerShell
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of the Get-ADUser cmdlet to collect user information and output it to a file


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches "Command" LIKE '%Get-ADUser %' AND "Command" LIKE '% -Filter \\*%' AND "Command" LIKE '% > %' OR "Command" LIKE '% | Select %' OR "Command" LIKE '%Out-File%' OR "Command" LIKE '%Set-Content%' OR "Command" LIKE '%Add-Content%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Get-ADUser User Discovery and Export on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches "Command" LIKE '%Get-ADUser %' AND "Command" LIKE '% -Filter \\*%'  AND "Command" LIKE '% > %' OR "Command" LIKE '% | Select %' OR "Command" LIKE '%Out-File%' OR "Command" LIKE '%Set-Content%' OR "Command" LIKE '%Add-Content%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Get-ADUser User Discovery and Export
Event description: Detects when usage of the Get-ADUser cmdlet to collect user information and output it to a file.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
